notifications.panelDescription: Configure notification channels and behavior for this client.
notifications.inAppPersistent: Keep in-app notifications open until dismissed
notifications.browserOnlyBackground: Show browser notifications only when app is in background
notifications.browserAlsoForeground: Show browser notifications in foreground and background
notifications.noChannelWarning: No channels enabled for this severity.
notifications.disabledHint: Notifications are disabled for this client.
notifications.appActionAuditDescription: Store every device control action sent from this app token.
notifications.appActionAuditAlwaysOn: App action logging is always enabled
notifications.appActionAuditAlwaysOnDesc: All control actions sent from this app are continuously audited per client.
notifications.appActionHistoryDescriptio: Newest first. Shared for all users in this client.

notifications.ruleEntitySearchPlaceholde: Search by name, entity id, state...
notifications.ruleClauseEntityPlaceholde: Clause entity (leave empty to use default)
notifications.adminOnly: Admin access required to change notification settings.
notifications.remoteHealthDescription: Run a periodic reachability check against external HA addresses and send SMS alerts to super admin numbers on failure.
notifications.remoteHealthSmsHint: One number per line. Local numbers use the selected country code.
notifications.remoteHealthScopeHint: Only public HTTP(S) addresses are monitored. Local/private addresses are skipped.
notifications.remoteHealthRunDisabled: The health check is disabled. Turn it on and save before running it.
notifications.remoteHealthRunOk: Health check completed. All monitored remote instances responded.
notifications.remoteHealthRunDetected: The health check found unreachable remote instances.
notifications.remoteHealthRunFailed: Could not run the health check.

adminPages.connection.description: Manage the Home Assistant connection, multiple instances, and primary or fallback addresses without opening a modal.
adminPages.notifications.description: Adjust notification channels, message copy, and SMS setup on a dedicated page that is easier to scan and maintain.
adminPages.storage.description: Keep users, dashboards, and client-side admin choices on a fixed page instead of burying them inside system settings.

connection.selectedClientOnly: Changes are saved only for this client
connection.instanceListBody: Choose which Home Assistant instance to edit, or add a new one for local, remote, or building-specific access.
connection.instanceEditorBody: Use the local or WireGuard address as the primary URL, and keep Nabu Casa or another remote URL as fallback.
connection.localUrlHelper: Tip: you can paste only a local IP or hostname. We will turn 192.168.105.120 into http://192.168.105.120:8123.
connection.localUrlHttpsWarning: This app is running over HTTPS. Browsers usually block local HTTP to Home Assistant, even when WireGuard is working. Use HTTPS on Home Assistant or keep an HTTPS fallback URL.
connection.fallbackUrlHelper: Optional backup path when the local address is unavailable, for example a Nabu Casa URL.
connection.saveHint: Save after editing to update the shared HA setup for this client.
connection.testFallbackSuccess: Primary URL failed, but fallback responded successfully.
connection.testBlockedMixedContent: The browser blocked the local Home Assistant URL because this app is running over HTTPS. Use HTTPS on Home Assistant or keep an HTTPS fallback URL.
connection.testFailedSingle: Could not connect to the selected Home Assistant URL.
connection.testFailedBoth: Neither the primary nor fallback URL responded.
connection.testMissingUrl: Add a primary Home Assistant URL before testing.
connection.testMissingToken: Add a long-lived token before testing this connection.
connection.testMissingOauthToken: This OAuth instance has no access token available to test with yet.
addCard.saunaBookingTempDescription: Add a sauna booking temperature card. Configure booking-active and temperature sensors after adding.
addCard.saunaMapDescription: Add a map card for sauna locations from Home Assistant zones.
addCard.popupLauncherDescription: Add a popup launcher card with a grid of buttons. Configure each button to open an existing card in a popup.
addCard.notificationTimelineDescription: Add a timeline card showing notification history (newest first, max 200).
addCard.globalTimelineDescription: Add a global timeline card for platform admin with cross-client sessions, actions and logs.
addCard.reportsDescription: Add a professional sauna and booking reports card with filters and PDF export.

superAdminBackups.title: Server-stored Home Assistant backups
superAdminBackups.subtitle: Manage backup files uploaded to our server through SFTP Storage. Super admin can track client and location folders, download files, and clean up old copies from one place.
superAdminBackups.clientsSubtitle: Select a client to inspect locations, remote paths, and backup status.
superAdminBackups.locationsSubtitle: These are the backup targets for each Home Assistant instance. They can use their own folder IDs without changing the connection IDs used by your dashboard.
superAdminBackups.emptyLocations: No locations found for this client yet.
superAdminBackups.filesSubtitle: These files can be downloaded or deleted directly from the super admin view.
superAdminBackups.emptyFiles: No backup files found in this location yet.
superAdminBackups.directoryMissingHelp: Create this folder before pointing Home Assistant SFTP Storage at the server. Once the folder exists, backups can appear here without additional app changes.
